content: Self-Refine's iterative single-model self-feedback loop can be augmented by integrating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives central to recent LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid framework that avoids the stagnation that often comes from single-perspective iterative refinement. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra supervised training or reinforcement learning while gaining the error-capturing benefits of divergent reflection.
